operator_attendance_prerequisites: operator is present and can stop the run before any live fetch is attempted
reviewer has approved the exact source list and metadata-only capture fields
network, download, processor, and registry mutation switches remain disabled for readiness review
abort_triggers: any source resolves outside the approved public allowlist
any workflow requests credentials, MFA, CAPTCHA, payment, upload, submission, certification, scheduling, or account creation
any step would invoke a processor or mutate the source registry before reviewer approval
